name: Boston Market Creamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: Garlic salt and pepper to taste
Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained (20 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, whisk together the cream celery soup, flour, and butter until smooth.
2. Add garlic salt and pepper to taste.
3. Stir in the thawed and drained spinach and diced onion.
4. Cook until heated through, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
5. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
